raw:
{
  "verses": [
    {
      "n": 19,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "fo wiꞥſch fwehtijs irr/ pirzin ts-
pirks/tad buhs winnam to peektu
Naudas Teefu pahr to peelikt/
ka tu to spreedis effi / tad tas
winnam peederrehs.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 20,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "20. Bet ja wiꞥſch to Tihrunnu
ne iſpirks/ jeb ja wiꞥſch to Tih-
rumu weenam zittam pahrdoſs/
tad tam ne buhswairs iſpirktam
tapt.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 21,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "21. Bet tam Tihrumam/ kad
wiꞥſch Gawileschanas-Gaddâ irr
iṣqahjis/ buhs tam KUNGAM
fwehtam buht/ itt ka weens wiṣ-
fai nodohts Tihruns/ tas buhs
tamPreesteram par Jhpaschunu.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 22,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "22. Un ja wiꞥſch irr tam KUNG-
GAM weenn Tihrumu fwehtijs/
fo wiꞥſch pirzis irr/ kas ne irr no
winna ihpaſcha Tihruma.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 23,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "23. Tad buhs tam Preesteram
to lihdsinaht / zik tawas Spree-
schanas Makfa irr lihds tam Ga-
wileschanas-Gaddam / un tam
buhs tai Deena doht / fo tu no-
spreedis effi / ka tas KUNGAM
fwehts effus.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 24,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "24. Gawileschanas-Gaddâ
buhs tam Tihrumam attak kluht
pee ta/ no ka wiꞥſch to bij pirzis/
pee ta / kam ta Semme ihpaſchi
peederreja.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 25,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "25. Wiṣṣa tawa Spreeſchana
laid irr pehz tahs fwehtas Wee-
tas Sihkeli / weenam Sihketam
buhs diwideſmits Geera buht.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 26,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "26. Bet to Pirindſimtu / kas
tam KUNGAM no Lohpeem
dsemm/ ne buhs ne weenam fweh-
tiht/ jepſchu tas irr Wehrſis/ jeb
"
    },
    {
      "n": 27,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Aws / tas peederr tam KUNG-
GAM.
27. Bet ja tas no weena ne
fchſihſta Lohpa irr/ tad buhs win-
nam to pehz tawas Spreeſchana-
iſpirkt/ un to peektu Teefu pahr
to peelikt / un ja tas ne tohp is-
pirks/ tad buhs tam pahrdohtan
tapt pehz tawas Spreeſchana-
"
    },
    {
      "n": 28,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "28. Un ne ko / kas nowehlehts
irr / fo tas tam KUNGAM no-
wehlehs no wiṣṣa / kas tam pee-
derr / no Zilweka / jeb no kahd-
Lohpa/ jeb no fava ihpaſcha Tih-
ruma ne buhs pahrdoht neds is-
pirkt / wiṣṣ / kas nowehlehts ir-
buhs tam KUNGAM par wee-
nu itt fwehtu Gwehtibu buht.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 29,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "29. Wiṣṣam Jeſdeldainain/ ka-
tam KUNGAM nowehleht-
tohp no Zilwekeem / ne buhs te-
pirktam/ bet nokantam tapt.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 30,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "30. Ir wiṣṣi Defmiti tah-
Semmes/ no tahs Semmes Lab-
bibaṣ/ no to Kohku Augſteen pee-
derr tam KUNGAM / tee ir-
tam KUNGAM fwehti.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 31,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "31. Bet ja kas no faiveen-
Defmiteem fo labbu iſpirztu is-
pirks / tam buhs to peektu Teef-
pahr to peelikt.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 32,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "32. Un wiṣṣi Defmitti no lee-
leem un fihkeem Lohpeem/ kas a-
* Rihkſti tohp noskaititi / tee De-
fmitti no wiṣṣa buhs tam KUNG-
GAM fwehti.
"
    }
  ],
  "confidence": "high",
  "notes": ""
}
